SPLMTL_LCNS_ACRDTN 

LABEL: Annual Provider Record in Supplemental Provider License and Accreditation File 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate that there is/are one or more record(s) in the provider License supplemental file for 
this provider (linking from provider base to the provider Location and provider License files via the
